name: v05-hello-with-mw
description: Minimal demo of v0.5.2 workflow-level middleware. The workflow body is one expr step; the cross-cutting concerns (auth, audit) are factored out to middleware declared once at the top of the workflow definition. Demonstrates that the workflow-level chain runs uniformly across every request to this workflow without per-trigger duplication. Real deployments would chain `jwt-auth` + `audit-log` (or similar ops middleware); this demo uses `auth-check` to keep the example dependency-free (no JWT_SECRET / JWT_AUDIENCE required to exercise it).

inputs.expression: ({ greeting: 'hello, world', via: ctx.state.identity.via, ts: Date.now() })
